interpretation.why_not_complete: The paper deployment protocol is source-indexed and partially cross-checked with debug latency/decoder/guidance artifacts, but TensorRT, asynchronous C++ integration, CppAD deployment, RTX 4060 Mobile Mini PC latency, live state estimation, mocap context, and closed-loop task logs are not available locally.

rows.boundary: No trained closed-loop controller is running at 25 Hz.
rows.local_evidence: smoothness_latency_audit records 40 ms control period and 25 Hz checks.
rows.paper_claim: Tracking policies are trained and deployed at 25 Hz to leave diffusion inference time.

rows.boundary: No TensorRT engine benchmark or measured deployment latency exists locally.
rows.local_evidence: Budget check records 20.0 ms / 20 steps, fraction 0.5.
rows.paper_claim: Diffusion inference takes about 20 ms using 20 denoising steps.

rows.boundary: No C++ async runtime integration or thread scheduling measurement exists locally.
rows.local_evidence: Recorded as a deployment boundary; local probes are offline/synchronous Python scripts.
rows.paper_claim: Diffusion inference is asynchronous in a separate thread.

rows.boundary: No TensorRT engine, conversion script, or engine latency benchmark exists locally.
rows.local_evidence: official_artifact_audit found no official checkpoint/TensorRT engine candidate.
rows.paper_claim: TensorRT accelerates diffusion inference on the onboard GPU.

rows.boundary: This host cannot validate the paper onboard hardware latency claim.
rows.local_evidence: Host has RTX 4090 D GPUs, not the stated onboard Mini PC stack.
rows.paper_claim: Deployment uses a portable Mini PC with NVIDIA RTX 4060 Mobile GPU.

rows.boundary: The local decoder is randomly initialized and lacks the trained checkpoint/proprioception layout.
rows.local_evidence: receding_horizon_decoder_probe decodes current index 4 latent to a 29-D action on CPU.
rows.paper_claim: Lightweight VAE decoder runs synchronously on CPU and decodes current denoised latent.

rows.boundary: Local gradients use Python/PyTorch-style debug probes, not CppAD in deployed C++.
rows.local_evidence: guidance_cost_coverage_audit verifies paper-explicit costs have source and debug gradients.
rows.paper_claim: Guiding-cost gradients are computed automatically with CppAD inside each denoising iteration.

rows.boundary: No 500 Hz estimator, live robot state, or task rollout log exists locally.
rows.local_evidence: Decoder/schema probes use fixture-derived state vectors, not live state estimation.
rows.paper_claim: Joystick and inpainting tasks use proprioceptive state estimation for pose/velocities.

rows.boundary: No mocap stream, obstacle scene log, or closed-loop task trajectory exists locally.
rows.local_evidence: Guidance formulas are debug-checked, but no mocap/environment context is available.
rows.paper_claim: Waypoint/obstacle tasks use motion capture for environment context and localization.

scope: Level C diffusion deployment protocol source claims, debug evidence, and explicit deployment boundaries
